channel.title: Pc on Timetombs
channel.description: Recent content in Pc on Timetombs

item.title: [工具] pc
item.description: USB RTL9210B 最新固件下载：https://www.station-drivers.com/index.php/zh/component/search/?searchword=RTL9210&searchphrase=all&Itemid=101 i9A-2242.cfg VID = 0xbda PID = 0x9210 MANUFACTURE = "JEYI" PRODUCT = "i9A-2242" SERIAL = "221010010021" SCSI_VENDOR = "Realtek" SCSI_PRODUCT = "RTL9210B" ASPMDIS = 0x1 DISK_IPS_THRES = 0x0 LED = 0x02 CUSTOMIZED_LED = 22 02 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 SUSPEND_LED_OFF =
